# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - "v*.*.*"
      - "v*.*.*-*"

permissions:
  contents: write
  packages: write
  id-token: write

concurrency:
  group: release-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build & package
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      version: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.version }}
      tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tag }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Derive version from tag
        id: meta
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          tag="${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
          version="${tag#v}"
          echo "tag=$tag" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "version=$version" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"
          cache: npm

      - name: Install Node deps
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build (Node)
        run: npm run build --if-present

      - name: Pack npm tarball
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/npm
          npm pack --pack-destination dist/npm

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"
          cache: pip

      - name: Install Python build tooling
        run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip build twine

      - name: Build Python distributions
        run: python -m build

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-artifacts
          path: |
            dist/npm/*.tgz
            dist/*.whl
            dist/*.tar.gz
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 7

  release:
    name: Create GitHub Release
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-artifacts
          path: dist

      - name: Create GitHub release and upload assets
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        with:
          tag_name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.tag }}
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.tag }}
          generate_release_notes: true
          files: |
            dist/**/*.tgz
            dist/**/*.whl
            dist/**/*.tar.gz

  publish_npm:
    name: Publish to npm
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"

      - name: Install Node deps
        run: npm ci

      - name: Publish to npm
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
        run: npm publish --access public

  publish_pypi:
    name: Publish to PyPI
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: pypi
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-artifacts
          path: dist

      - name: Publish to PyPI (trusted publishing)
        uses: pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release/v1
        with:
          packages-dir: dist
          skip-existing: true
